title: CAR MODEL VARIANT detail page » PRICES
user_story:
As a visitor
I want the CAR MODEL VARIANT detail page to show all connected PRICES
So I can ...
description:
* The CAR MODEL VARIANT detail page contains a section with a list of all connected PRICES.
* Each PRICE in the list is presented with its name and primary information.
* Each PRICE in the list contains a link to its detail page.
* Each PRICE in the list has a thumbnail image.
* When there is no PRICE connected to the CAR MODEL VARIANT then the section is not displayed at all.
